overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a cloaked character standing on a rocky mountain overlook during golden hour, gazing at a vast landscape of snow-capped mountains and a lake below. The scene features dramatic cloud formations with sunlight breaking through, creating a cinematic atmosphere typical of open-world fantasy games.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain cliff overlook with panoramic vista

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right above the character

agents.ego_description: The cloaked character stands motionless on the cliff edge, cape fluttering slightly in the wind, gazing out at the mountainous landscape and lake below.

entered.detail: Tall mountain with snow-covered summit dominating the horizon, backlit by golden sunlight
Calm body of water nestled in the valley between mountain ranges
Stone outcrop where the character stands, overlooking the drop to the valley below
Weathered stone column or ruin fragment to the left of the frame
Dense tree canopy covering the lower slopes between the cliff and the lake
Heavy cloud formations with breaks allowing golden sunlight to stream through

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky cliff overlooking a vast mountainous landscape at golden hour. Snow-capped peaks rise in the distance above a tranquil lake, while ancient stone ruins and dense forest fill the midground. The scene remains largely static with only subtle environmental motion like drifting clouds and a brief flock of birds crossing the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze over a vast mountainous landscape as the golden hour light emphasizes the scale of the environment. It begins with a cloaked character standing motionless on a rocky cliff, overlooking a tranquil lake nestled among snow-capped peaks. As the camera lingers, the stillness of the ancient stone ruins and dense forests in the midground is punctuated by the subtle movement of drifting clouds. The scene finally settles into a serene atmosphere as a brief flock of birds crosses the expansive sky, completing the panoramic view.
